name: SkillBoss — The wallet for AI agents
description: Give your OpenClaw agent access to 700+ AI tools via one wallet. Web scraping, web search, image/video/audio generation, email, TTS, and 100+ LLMs. One API key. Audit trail included.

apiKey.description: SkillBoss API key from https://skillboss.co/console. First top-up of $25 grants a $5 bonus (→$30 usable).

agentName.description: Optional label sent as X-Agent-Name with every call, used in the SkillBoss audit log.

baseUrl.description: Override for the SkillBoss API base URL. Defaults to https://api.skillboss.co/v1.

maxCostPerCallUsd.description: Maximum spend per tool call in USD. Defaults to 2.00.

defaultChatModel.description: Default model id for skillboss_chat. Defaults to claude-4-6-sonnet.

defaultImageModel.description: Default model id for skillboss_generate_image. Defaults to vertex/gemini-3-pro-image-preview.
